creator: dfog14@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 178014
subversion diff output

Currently, the ability to run net/bird under a group other than "wheel" is available, but it is not documented or utilized in this port.

The attached patch allows additional command arguments for user and group specification to be set in rc.conf and adds comments documenting their use cases. 

QA:
portlint: OK
poudriere: OK on 10.3R amd64 and i386
